Example_EN: That guy at the front desk was really helpful.
Example_CN: 前台那位男士非常愿意帮忙。

Example_EN: What is the main function of this software tool?
Example_CN: 这款软件工具的主要功能是什么？

Collocation: yesterday morning;the day before yesterday;yesterday's news
Example_EN: I finished the application form yesterday evening.
Example_CN: 我昨天晚上填完了申请表。

Example_EN: The advert creates a friendly image of the brand.
Example_CN: 这则广告塑造了品牌的友好形象。
MemoryTip: image：映在眼里或心里的样子。

Example_EN: Do you have this jacket in a smaller size?
Example_CN: 这件夹克有没有更小的尺码？

Example_EN: Teachers praised the children's good behavior today.
Example_CN: 老师今天表扬了孩子们的良好表现。
MemoryTip: behave 的名词；本表保留 behavior。

Example_EN: In addition to coffee, they also serve fresh juice.
Example_CN: 除了咖啡，他们还供应鲜榨果汁。

Example_EN: Tests will determine which course fits you best.
Example_CN: 测试将决定哪门课最适合你。
MemoryTip: de + termine：划定界限，作出判定。

Example_EN: Meet me at the train station at five o'clock.
Example_CN: 五点在火车站见我。

Example_EN: The town's population has grown over ten years.
Example_CN: 这座小镇的人口在十年间增长了。

Example_EN: Do not fail to bring your ID to the interview.
Example_CN: 面试时千万别忘了带身份证。

Example_EN: We should do more to protect the environment.
Example_CN: 我们应该做更多事来保护环境。
MemoryTip: environ + ment：环绕在身边的一切。

Example_EN: Food production needs careful quality checks.
Example_CN: 食品生产需要仔细的质量检查。
MemoryTip: produce 的名词：造出来的过程和量。

Example_EN: Please read the contract carefully before signing.
Example_CN: 签字前请仔细阅读合同。
MemoryTip: con + tract：双方拉到一起的约定。

Example_EN: She is a key player on the school basketball team.
Example_CN: 她是校篮球队的关键队员。
MemoryTip: play + er：上场玩耍或参赛的人。

Example_EN: Please leave a short comment after the talk.
Example_CN: 讲座结束后请留下简短评论。

Collocation: enter a room;enter data;enter a contest
Example_EN: Please knock before you enter the office.
Example_CN: 进入办公室前请先敲门。

Example_EN: Accidents can occur when people rush in the rain.
Example_CN: 人们在雨中匆忙赶路时可能发生意外。

Example_EN: She prefers to walk alone along the quiet beach.
Example_CN: 她更喜欢独自沿安静的海滩散步。

Example_EN: There has been a significant rise in online learning.
Example_CN: 在线学习出现了显著增长。
MemoryTip: sign + ificant：有强烈信号的重要。

Example_EN: Always take this drug exactly as the doctor says.
Example_CN: 请严格按照医嘱服用这种药。
MemoryTip: drug：药用化学品，语境也可指毒品。

Example_EN: There is a bright poster on the classroom wall.
Example_CN: 教室墙上贴着一张鲜艳的海报。

Example_EN: We watched a short comedy series last weekend.
Example_CN: 上周末我们看了一部短喜剧系列剧。

Example_EN: Is there a direct bus from here to the museum?
Example_CN: 从这里到博物馆有直达公交吗？

Example_EN: Hard work alone does not always guarantee success.
Example_CN: 仅靠勤奋并不总能保证成功。

Collocation: tomorrow morning;the day after tomorrow;see you tomorrow
Example_EN: The results will be published tomorrow afternoon.
Example_CN: 成绩将于明天下午公布。

Example_EN: The film director thanked the whole crew on stage.
Example_CN: 电影导演在台上感谢了全体剧组。
MemoryTip: direct + or：负责指挥方向的人。

Example_EN: Please speak clearly so everyone can hear you.
Example_CN: 请说清楚，好让大家都听见。

Example_EN: A lack of sleep can make learning harder.
Example_CN: 睡眠不足会使学习更困难。

Example_EN: Please review chapter three before the test.
Example_CN: 考试前请复习第三章。

Example_EN: Success will depend on how well we prepare.
Example_CN: 成功将取决于我们准备得有多充分。

Example_EN: They will race around the lake tomorrow morning.
Example_CN: 他们明天早上将环湖赛跑。

Example_EN: I did not recognize him with the new haircut.
Example_CN: 他剪了新发型，我竟没认出来。
MemoryTip: re + cognize：再次认出；拼写保留美式。

Example_EN: Please open the window for some fresh air.
Example_CN: 请打开窗户透透新鲜空气。

Collocation: main purpose;on purpose;for the purpose of
Example_EN: The main purpose of this meeting is to share ideas.
Example_CN: 这次会议的主要目的是交流想法。

Example_EN: Please contact the customer service department.
Example_CN: 请联系客户服务部门。
MemoryTip: de + part + ment：分出去的职能部门。

Example_EN: You will gain useful experience from this internship.
Example_CN: 你将从这次实习中获得有用经验。

Example_EN: They sat under a tall tree and shared lunch.
Example_CN: 他们坐在一棵大树下分享午餐。
MemoryTip: tree：有主干和枝叶的高大植物。

Example_EN: She hopes to go to college after finishing school.
Example_CN: 她希望中学毕业后上大学。

Example_EN: Please do not argue with the referee during the match.
Example_CN: 比赛中请不要和裁判争辩。
MemoryTip: argue：用言语较劲或提出论据。

Example_EN: Please board the train at platform three.
Example_CN: 请在三号站台上火车。

Example_EN: We spent the holiday hiking in the mountains.
Example_CN: 我们假期在山里徒步。
MemoryTip: holy + day：神圣休息日，引申为假期。

Collocation: high mark;mark the page;leave a mark
Example_EN: Please mark the correct answers with a pencil.
Example_CN: 请用铅笔标出正确答案。

Example_EN: The old church stands in the centre of the village.
Example_CN: 那座老教堂矗立在村庄中心。

Example_EN: This machine can print both sides of the paper.
Example_CN: 这台机器可以双面打印纸张。
MemoryTip: machine：由部件组成的自动装置。

Collocation: achieve a goal;achieve success;hard to achieve
Example_EN: With steady practice you can achieve your target.
Example_CN: 通过稳定练习你可以达成目标。

Example_EN: Please check every item on the shopping list.
Example_CN: 请核对购物清单上的每一项。

Example_EN: Can you prove that your answer is correct?
Example_CN: 你能证明你的答案是正确的吗？

Example_EN: The bus ticket went up by twenty cents.
Example_CN: 公交票价上涨了二十美分。

Example_EN: Autumn is my favourite season of the year.
Example_CN: 秋天是我一年中最喜欢的季节。

Example_EN: Please leave your wet umbrella on the floor mat.
Example_CN: 请把湿雨伞放在地板垫上。

Example_EN: Please put your stuff in the locker before class.
Example_CN: 上课前请把你的东西放进储物柜。
MemoryTip: stuff：说不清名字的一堆东西。

Example_EN: The river is too wide to swim across safely.
Example_CN: 这条河太宽，没法安全游过去。

Example_EN: Is anyone free to help with the decorations?
Example_CN: 有人有空帮忙布置吗？

Example_EN: This method helps beginners remember new words.
Example_CN: 这种方法帮助初学者记住新单词。

Example_EN: The report includes a careful analysis of costs.
Example_CN: 报告包含对成本的仔细分析。

Example_EN: The school held an election for student leaders.
Example_CN: 学校举行了学生干部选举。

Example_EN: His uncle has long experience in military service.
Example_CN: 他叔叔有长期服兵役经历。

Example_EN: We booked a small hotel near the train station.
Example_CN: 我们在火车站附近订了一家小旅馆。

Example_EN: She joined the photography club last term.
Example_CN: 她上学期加入了摄影俱乐部。

Example_EN: The temperature dropped below zero last night.
Example_CN: 昨夜气温降到了零度以下。

Example_EN: Shall we watch a movie after dinner tonight?
Example_CN: 今晚晚饭后我们看电影好吗？

Collocation: see a doctor;family doctor;doctor a report
Example_EN: You should see a doctor if the pain continues.
Example_CN: 如果疼痛持续，你应该去看医生。

Example_EN: We had a useful discussion about weekend plans.
Example_CN: 我们就周末计划进行了有益讨论。
MemoryTip: discuss 的名词：你来我往地谈。

Example_EN: I am sorry for being late to the meeting.
Example_CN: 抱歉开会迟到了。

Example_EN: Learning a new language can be a rewarding challenge.
Example_CN: 学习一门新语言可能是值得的挑战。

Example_EN: Sports can bring a nation together in celebration.
Example_CN: 体育能让一个国家团聚欢庆。
MemoryTip: nation：共同认同下的一群人与国土。

Example_EN: We have nearly finished packing for the trip.
Example_CN: 我们差不多收拾好旅行行李了。

Example_EN: The mayor made a short statement to the press.
Example_CN: 市长向媒体发表了简短声明。
MemoryTip: state + ment：把话说成正式记录。

Example_EN: Please click the link to download the file.
Example_CN: 请点击链接下载文件。

Collocation: despite the rain;despite the fact;despite this
Example_EN: Despite the rain, the match continued as planned.
Example_CN: 尽管下雨，比赛仍按计划继续。

Example_EN: Let me introduce you to our new classmate.
Example_CN: 让我把你介绍给我们的新同学。

Example_EN: Speaking two languages is a clear advantage.
Example_CN: 会说两种语言是明显的优势。

Example_EN: Are you ready for the presentation this afternoon?
Example_CN: 你为今天下午的演示准备好了吗？

Example_EN: They plan to marry next spring in their hometown.
Example_CN: 他们计划明年春天在家乡结婚。

Collocation: go on strike;strike a deal;lightning strike
Example_EN: Workers may strike if pay talks fail again.
Example_CN: 若薪资谈判再失败，工人可能会罢工。

Example_EN: The lake is about three miles from our hotel.
Example_CN: 那个湖离我们酒店大约三英里。

Example_EN: You should seek advice before signing anything.
Example_CN: 签字前你应该征求意见。

Example_EN: She has a strong ability to explain hard ideas.
Example_CN: 她很有能力解释难懂的想法。

Example_EN: Please complete unit five before next Monday.
Example_CN: 请在下周一前完成第五单元。

Example_EN: Do not forget your library card at home.
Example_CN: 别把借书卡忘在家里。

Example_EN: She works night shifts at the city hospital.
Example_CN: 她在市医院上夜班。

Example_EN: Please reply quickly if you can attend.
Example_CN: 如果能参加，请尽快回复。

Example_EN: My job interview is scheduled for Thursday morning.
Example_CN: 我的求职面试安排在周四上午。

Example_EN: Both sides finally reached an agreement on pay.
Example_CN: 双方最终就薪酬达成协议。
MemoryTip: agree + ment：双方点头形成的约定。

Example_EN: The company will release the new update next week.
Example_CN: 公司下周将发布新的更新。

Example_EN: Everyone must pay tax on their yearly income.
Example_CN: 每个人都必须为年收入纳税。

Example_EN: We need a practical solution to this traffic problem.
Example_CN: 我们需要一个切实可行的办法解决交通问题。
MemoryTip: solve 的名词：解开结的答案。

Example_EN: Paris is the capital of France.
Example_CN: 巴黎是法国的首都。

Example_EN: This cafe is popular with students after class.
Example_CN: 这家咖啡馆课后很受学生欢迎。

Example_EN: Can you give a more specific example, please?
Example_CN: 你能给一个更具体的例子吗？

Example_EN: We saw a beautiful sunset over the quiet lake.
Example_CN: 我们看到宁静湖面上美丽的日落。

Collocation: fear of;for fear that;live in fear
Example_EN: Many people share a fear of public speaking.
Example_CN: 许多人共同害怕公开演讲。

Example_EN: Our main aim this year is to improve reading speed.
Example_CN: 我们今年的主要目标是提高阅读速度。

Example_EN: Children should not watch too much television.
Example_CN: 孩子们不该看太多电视。
MemoryTip: tele + vision：远方画面送到眼前。

Example_EN: Traffic noise is becoming a serious problem here.
Example_CN: 交通噪声在这里正成为严重问题。

Example_EN: We failed to hit our sales target last month.
Example_CN: 我们上个月没达到销售目标。

Example_EN: She earned a degree in history last year.
Example_CN: 她去年获得了历史学学位。
MemoryTip: degree：阶梯上的一级，也指温度。

Example_EN: Please pull the door gently; it sticks sometimes.
Example_CN: 请轻轻拉门，它有时会卡住。

Example_EN: Stop when the traffic light turns red.
Example_CN: 交通灯变红时请停下。
